text:
- `args.rs:318` → `/// Session id (prefix) to resume.` (drop the codename clause). Once tier-3 is deleted (see §1), codename is no longer a valid `--session` value. [...] Assistant: Now `hooks.rs` codename field:
 [...] Assistant: Now `pty_rpc.rs` — delete `resume_by_codename` and its call:
 [...] - **session_start / hooks responses + logs** (me) ✅ — `codename` field & log dropped
- **slog filename** (me) ✅ — raw `session_id`
- **pty resume** (me) ✅ — `resume_by_codename` deleted; raw-id exact+prefix only
- **docs** (me) ✅ — README, daemon-rpc-surface, tail-v2-design
